sections.paragraph:
fut. יִסְעַד. to prop, to uphold, to support, Psa 18:36 Pro 20:28 hence to sustain, to aid, Psa 20:3 41:4 94:18 . Specially סָעַד לֵב to support the heart, i.e. to refresh oneself with food (see לֵב No. 1, letter ). Gen 18:5, סַעֲדוּ לִבְּכֶם “refresh your heart,” refresh yourselves with food, Psa 104:15 Jud. 9:8 . Intrans. 1Ki 13:7, סָעֳדָה refresh thyself (compare מַטֶּה).

Derived noun מִסְעָד.
